title: Navarretia klickitatensis
taxonomy: Navarretia klickitatensis is a species within the plant family Polemoniaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that is native to the southwestern part of North America. The classification of Navarretia klickatatensis includes its order (Ericales), class (Magnoliopsida), and division (Angiospermae). Further classification places it in the kingdom Plantae. Its classification is consistent with the APG III system of plant classification.
